text:
As soon as I load the PC-BSD graphical installer, my monitor goes to sleep. I've had this problem before under Linux and I reported the bug here:

https://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=29478

#pcbsd@freenode

[14:27] <dlavigne> and that the fix requires a change to i915 driver

Fix: 

Copy Linux :D
How-To-Repeat: As above
